jobTitle: AI Developer ‒ LLM Integration & Java / Spring
responsibilities: Lead the design and development of AI-powered solutions, including AI agents, chatbots, and intelligent automation workflows.
Integrate LLMs (e.g., GPT, Cohere, or open-source models) into Java/Spring-based applications for NLP, decision-making, and predictive analytics.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams (developers, data scientists, product managers) to define AI strategy, roadmap, and technical requirements.
Optimize AI workflows for scalability, performance, and cost-efficiency, leveraging Oracle databases for data management.
Mentor junior developers and promote innovation in AI / ML practices.
Stay current with emerging AI technologies and assess their business applicability.
Ensure compliance with data privacy, security, and ethical AI standards.
